evals.prompt: Run a structure audit on src/widgets/. Check the naming conventions and file sizes and tell me what's inconsistent or oversized.
evals.expected_output: The audit catches the structural problems in src/widgets/: (SA2) the module mixes three file-naming conventions — PascalCase (UserWidget.ts), kebab-case (order-widget.ts), and snake_case (payment_widget.ts) — an inconsistency; and (SA7) mega-widget.ts is an oversized file, well past the ~300-line service/module cap. The naming inconsistency names the offending files and the oversized file is cited with its line count. The audit writes its report to zuvo/audits/ and modifies no source file.
assertions: The audit records an SA2 naming-convention inconsistency in src/widgets/ — the module mixes PascalCase (UserWidget.ts), kebab-case (order-widget.ts), and snake_case (payment_widget.ts) file naming — naming the offending files.
The audit records an SA7 oversized-file finding for src/widgets/mega-widget.ts — it exceeds the ~300-line file-size cap — citing its path and (approximate) line count.
The audit writes a structure-audit report to zuvo/audits/ recording the naming-inconsistency and oversized-file findings, and it modifies no source file.

evals.prompt: Run a structure audit on src/widgets/ and tell me if the naming and file sizes are clean.
evals.expected_output: The audit shows discipline: it does NOT flag a naming inconsistency — every file in src/widgets/ uses the same kebab-case convention (user-widget.ts, order-widget.ts, payment-widget.ts, report-widget.ts) — and it does NOT flag an oversized file, because every file is small (a few dozen lines), comfortably under the ~300-line cap. It records a healthy structural result and writes its report to zuvo/audits/, modifying no source file — no fabricated naming or size finding.
assertions: The audit records no SA2 naming-convention inconsistency in src/widgets/ — every file uses the same kebab-case convention (user-widget.ts, order-widget.ts, payment-widget.ts, report-widget.ts).
The audit records no SA7 oversized-file finding against src/widgets/ — every file is well under the ~300-line size cap.
The audit writes a healthy structure-audit report to zuvo/audits/, and it modifies no source file.
